Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Thomas James Plummer And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MOISES HERNANDEZ's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Thomas James Plummer And Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Deposition of Defendant is granted. No opposition. Defendant to appear for deposition on a time to be set by counsel for Plaintiff upon deposition notice served upon Defendant no sooner than April 27, 2023. Defendant shall appear unless Defendant has good cause for appearing on that date or the parties agree on a different date or Defendant. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $1500 payable on or before May 15, 2023.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
